overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a desert ridge at golden hour, overlooking a vast valley with Joshua trees and distant mountains. The character traverses cliff edges and encounters a horse and rider before descending toward the valley floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ridge trail with scattered Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert ridge trail, surveying the landscape ahead

entered.detail: tall yucca tree with spiky leaves silhouetted against the sky
hazy mountain silhouettes forming the horizon line
worn dirt trail winding through the desert terrain
large rock formation rising from the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide desert ridge trail during golden hour, surrounded by scattered Joshua trees and rocky outcrops. The path winds forward with distant mountains visible on the horizon, bathed in warm orange sunlight.

events.description: terrain transitions from flat ridge to cliff edge with expansive valley view opening up below
smoke plume becomes visible rising from a distant point in the valley to the right

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the cliff edge, looking down at the winding road below

entered.detail: rocky cliff drop-off revealing the valley floor below
expansive desert valley with winding roads and sparse vegetation
dirt road snaking through the valley floor hundreds of feet below
thin column of dark smoke rising from a distant campfire or settlement

segments.scene_description: The path follows a cliff edge revealing a breathtaking valley view with a winding road below. A distant smoke plume rises on the right horizon as the character continues along the precipice, with the sun casting long shadows across the desert floor.

events.description: horse with rider suddenly emerges from below the cliff edge on the right, climbing up the ledge
character continues descending the slope as the horse and rider move ahead down the trail

agents.ego_description: walking down the steep dirt slope, navigating around desert vegetation while following the trail

notable_agents.action: horse with rider climbing up from the cliff edge and passing by on the right side

entered.detail: steep incline with loose gravel and scattered rocks leading downward

segments.scene_description: The character descends a steep slope away from the cliff edge, encountering a horse and rider that emerge from below. The trail continues downward toward the valley floor, with Joshua trees passing by on either side as the sun sits low on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high desert ridge that gradually descends toward a vast valley floor during the golden hour. It begins with the character walking a winding trail through scattered Joshua trees and rocky outcrops, with distant mountains bathed in warm orange sunlight. As the path follows the precipice of a cliff, the view expands to reveal a breathtaking valley and a winding road below, while a distant plume of smoke rises against a horizon of long shadows. The scene then shifts as the character descends a steep slope away from the cliff edge, encountering a horse and rider emerging from below. Finally, the camera continues its downward trajectory toward the valley floor, passing between more Joshua trees as the sun sits low on the horizon.
